victim_side: Persons present in besieged Beirut/West Beirut
formula_note: Low = West Beirut civilian range floor; best = Beirut-area mixed series; high = Beirut total series.
uncertainty_note: This is explicitly a context-only fallback metric, not a publishable episode death estimate, because the underlying series differ in geography, date coverage, and status coding.
quality_note: Useful only as a provisional siege-specific envelope.
